crime.value: Apparent murder or assault of a blonde woman, with blood evidence but missing body
crime.quote: The floor was stained with blood and so were the walls, but the blonde was gone.

victim.value: Blonde woman being tailed by the narrator, identity and background unknown
victim.quote: I could see the blonde lying on the floor

closed_world.value: Three-unit condominium complex where the crime occurred
closed_world.quote: They were pretty-looking condos, three units in all.

investigator.value: First-person narrator, a part-time teacher working as private detective
investigator.quote: teaching school by day and playing private detective at night

red_herring.value: Missing cat pretense used as investigative cover, misdirecting from the real surveillance purpose
red_herring.quote: Sorry to disturb you. I live across the street and I'm looking for my cat. A gray cat.

clue_fairness.value: Door left ajar as observable clue available to both narrator and reader
clue_fairness.quote: I noticed her door was slightly ajar, which seemed odd

social_world.value: Economic disparity between corporate wealth in luxury cars versus working-class surveillance in cramped jalopy
social_world.quote: all the money gathered around me, corporate hacks in luxury sedans...sitting lock-jawed in my cramped jalopy

media_and_audience.value: Millennial anxiety and apocalyptic media broadcasts creating atmospheric dread
media_and_audience.quote: News bulletins...about terrorists...All the talk about the new millennium was making me nervous

investigator_wound.value: Economic desperation driving career transition from teaching to private investigation despite inexperience
investigator_wound.quote: teaching school by day and playing private detective at night...I wanted the outdoors and the feel of the chase

_meta.title: ebook g j prager 039 the lesson plan 039
